  "R1.3": "The agent thoroughly audits every load-bearing claim against the corresponding evidence, identifying a critical misrepresentation of the Luecken et al. (2022) benchmark results.",
  "R1.6": "The agent improves problem areas with a detailed rewrite sketch and identifies redundancy and dense phrasing, showing careful editing but not fully consistent across all aspects.",
  "RX.1": "The agent clearly discloses uncertainty regarding the Harmony claim and suggests verification, marking confidence and missing evidence for each recommendation.",
  "RX.3": "The output stays within the agreed scope without any drift, covering exactly the requested dimensions.",
  "RX.4": "The agent avoids introducing new errors and identifies harmful patterns in the original text, ensuring no regressions.",
  "RX.5": "Major rewrites are traced but minor edits lack traceability, meeting some but not all criteria for provenance."

rationale.R1.3: The agent thoroughly audits every load-bearing claim against the corresponding evidence, identifying a critical misrepresentation of the Luecken et al. (2022) benchmark results.
rationale.R1.6: The agent improves problem areas with a detailed rewrite sketch and identifies redundancy and dense phrasing, showing careful editing but not fully consistent across all aspects.
rationale.RX.1: The agent clearly discloses uncertainty regarding the Harmony claim and suggests verification, marking confidence and missing evidence for each recommendation.
rationale.RX.3: The output stays within the agreed scope without any drift, covering exactly the requested dimensions.
rationale.RX.4: The agent avoids introducing new errors and identifies harmful patterns in the original text, ensuring no regressions.
rationale.RX.5: Major rewrites are traced but minor edits lack traceability, meeting some but not all criteria for provenance.
